nasb.text: He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High Will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.

esv.text: He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.

cnv.text: 住在至高者的隱密處的， 必在全能者的蔭庇下安居。

ccb.text: 安居在至高者隐秘处的人， 必蒙全能者的荫庇。

csbs.text: 住在至高者隐秘处的， 将安居在全能者的荫庇下。
